definition.procedurexml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="event_trigger" deletable="false" x="40" y="40"><field name="trigger">entity_ticks</field><next><block type="java_code"><field name="CODE">entity.setInvulnerable(entity.getPersistentData().getBoolean("Invulnerable"));</field><next><block type="controls_if"><value name="IF0"><block type="entity_nbt_logic_get"><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value><value name="tagName"><block type="text"><field name="TEXT">Invulnerable</field></block></value></block></value><statement name="DO0"><block type="entity_extinguish"><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value><next><block type="entity_clearpotions"><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value><next><block type="entity_set_ticks_frozen"><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value><value name="ticksfrozen"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">0</field></block></value><next><block type="set_invulnerable_time"><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value><value name="time"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">10000</field></block></value></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></statement></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
